creator: nishida@csl.sony.co.jp
text:
Hi,
Thanks for the patch. I approve it.
--
Yoshifumi Nishida
nishida@csl.sony.co.jp


From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>

 > Maintainer of net/tcpillust,

 > Please note that PR ports/110421 has just been submitted.

 > and a committer will take care of it.
